Class QueryBuilder<T>

java.lang.Object
com.hogwai.dynamodb.simplified.builder.QueryBuilder<T>
Type Parameters:
T - the type of the item
public class QueryBuilder<T> extends Object
A fluent builder for querying items in a DynamoDB table or index. Supports key conditions, filters, projections, sorting, pagination, and global secondary index usage. Part of the DynamoDB Simplified library.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    QueryBuilder(@NonNull software.amazon.awssdk.enhanced.dynamodb.DynamoDbIndex<T> index)
    Constructs a new QueryBuilder for querying the given secondary index.
    QueryBuilder(@NonNull software.amazon.awssdk.enhanced.dynamodb.DynamoDbIndex<T> index, @Nullable software.amazon.awssdk.services.dynamodb.DynamoDbClient dynamoDbClient)
    Constructs a new QueryBuilder for querying the given secondary index with a low-level client.
    QueryBuilder(@NonNull software.amazon.awssdk.enhanced.dynamodb.DynamoDbTable<T> table)
    Constructs a new QueryBuilder for the given table.
    QueryBuilder(@NonNull software.amazon.awssdk.enhanced.dynamodb.DynamoDbTable<T> table, @Nullable software.amazon.awssdk.services.dynamodb.DynamoDbClient dynamoDbClient)
    Constructs a new QueryBuilder for the given table with a low-level client.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    @NonNull QueryBuilder<T>
    ascending()
    Sets the query to return results in ascending sort key order (the default).
    @NonNull QueryBuilder<T>
    consistentRead(boolean consistentRead)
    Enables or disables strongly consistent reads.
    long
    count()
    Returns the total number of matching items by iterating all query result pages.
    @NonNull QueryBuilder<T>
    descending()
    Sets the query to return results in descending sort key order.
    @NonNull List<T>
    executeAll()
    Executes the query and returns all matching items aggregated from all pages.
    @NonNull Optional<T>
    executeAndGetFirst()
    Executes the query and returns the first matching item, if any.
    @NonNull Stream<T>
    executeStream()
    Executes the query and returns a lazy stream of all matching items.
    @NonNull PagedResult<T>
    executeWithPagination()
    Executes the query and returns only the first page of results along with the last evaluated key for pagination.
    @NonNull QueryBuilder<T>
    filter(@Nullable FilterExpression filter)
    Configures a post-query filter expression from a pre-built FilterExpression.
    @NonNull QueryBuilder<T>
    filter(@NonNull Consumer<FilterExpression> filterBuilder)
    Configures a post-query filter expression using a FilterExpression consumer.
    @NonNull QueryBuilder<T>
    limit(int limit)
    Limits the number of items evaluated per page.
    @NonNull QueryBuilder<T>
    partitionKey(@NonNull Object pkValue)
    Sets the key condition to match all items with the given partition key value.
    @NonNull QueryBuilder<T>
    partitionKeyAndSortKeyBeginsWith(@NonNull Object pkValue, @NonNull String skPrefix)
    Sets the key condition to match items whose sort key begins with the given prefix within the specified partition.
    @NonNull QueryBuilder<T>
    partitionKeyAndSortKeyBetween(@NonNull Object pkValue, @NonNull Object skLow, @NonNull Object skHigh)
    Sets the key condition to match items whose sort key falls within the specified range (inclusive) within the given partition.
    @NonNull QueryBuilder<T>
    partitionKeyAndSortKeyEquals(@NonNull Object pkValue, @NonNull Object skValue)
    Sets the key condition to match the item with the exact partition key and sort key values.
    @NonNull QueryBuilder<T>
    partitionKeyAndSortKeyGreaterThan(@NonNull Object pkValue, @NonNull Object skValue)
    Sets the key condition to match items whose sort key is strictly greater than the given value within the specified partition.
    @NonNull QueryBuilder<T>
    partitionKeyAndSortKeyGreaterThanOrEqual(@NonNull Object pkValue, @NonNull Object skValue)
    Sets the key condition to match items whose sort key is greater than or equal to the given value within the specified partition.
    @NonNull QueryBuilder<T>
    partitionKeyAndSortKeyLessThan(@NonNull Object pkValue, @NonNull Object skValue)
    Sets the key condition to match items whose sort key is strictly less than the given value within the specified partition.
    @NonNull QueryBuilder<T>
    partitionKeyAndSortKeyLessThanOrEqual(@NonNull Object pkValue, @NonNull Object skValue)
    Sets the key condition to match items whose sort key is less than or equal to the given value within the specified partition.
    @NonNull QueryBuilder<T>
    project(@NonNull String... attributes)
    Restricts the returned attributes to the specified ones.
    @NonNull QueryBuilder<T>
    project(@NonNull Consumer<ProjectionExpression> projectionBuilder)
    Restricts the returned attributes by configuring a ProjectionExpression via a consumer.
    @NonNull QueryBuilder<T>
    returnConsumedCapacity(@NonNull software.amazon.awssdk.services.dynamodb.model.ReturnConsumedCapacity returnConsumedCapacity)
    Sets the return consumed capacity value for the query.
    @NonNull QueryBuilder<T>
    select(@Nullable software.amazon.awssdk.services.dynamodb.model.Select select)
    Sets the select parameter for the query, controlling which attributes are returned.
    @NonNull QueryBuilder<T>
    startFrom(@Nullable Map<String, software.amazon.awssdk.services.dynamodb.model.AttributeValue> lastEvaluatedKey)
    Sets the exclusive start key for paginated queries.

    • QueryBuilder

      public QueryBuilder(@NonNull software.amazon.awssdk.enhanced.dynamodb.DynamoDbTable<T> table)
      Constructs a new QueryBuilder for the given table.
      Parameters:
      table - the DynamoDB table

    • QueryBuilder

      public QueryBuilder(@NonNull software.amazon.awssdk.enhanced.dynamodb.DynamoDbIndex<T> index)
      Constructs a new QueryBuilder for querying the given secondary index.
      Parameters:
      index - the DynamoDB secondary index

    • QueryBuilder

      public QueryBuilder(@NonNull software.amazon.awssdk.enhanced.dynamodb.DynamoDbTable<T> table, @Nullable software.amazon.awssdk.services.dynamodb.DynamoDbClient dynamoDbClient)
      Constructs a new QueryBuilder for the given table with a low-level client.
      Parameters:
      table - the DynamoDB table
      dynamoDbClient - the low-level DynamoDB client (nullable)

    • QueryBuilder

      public QueryBuilder(@NonNull software.amazon.awssdk.enhanced.dynamodb.DynamoDbIndex<T> index, @Nullable software.amazon.awssdk.services.dynamodb.DynamoDbClient dynamoDbClient)
      Constructs a new QueryBuilder for querying the given secondary index with a low-level client.
      Parameters:
      index - the DynamoDB secondary index
      dynamoDbClient - the low-level DynamoDB client (nullable)

  • Method Details

    • partitionKey

      public @NonNull QueryBuilder<T> partitionKey(@NonNull Object pkValue)
      Sets the key condition to match all items with the given partition key value.
      Parameters:
      pkValue - the partition key value
      Returns:
      this builder for chaining

    • partitionKeyAndSortKeyEquals

      public @NonNull QueryBuilder<T> partitionKeyAndSortKeyEquals(@NonNull Object pkValue, @NonNull Object skValue)
      Sets the key condition to match the item with the exact partition key and sort key values.
      Parameters:
      pkValue - the partition key value
      skValue - the sort key value
      Returns:
      this builder for chaining

    • partitionKeyAndSortKeyBeginsWith

      public @NonNull QueryBuilder<T> partitionKeyAndSortKeyBeginsWith(@NonNull Object pkValue, @NonNull String skPrefix)
      Sets the key condition to match items whose sort key begins with the given prefix within the specified partition.
      Parameters:
      pkValue - the partition key value
      skPrefix - the sort key prefix string
      Returns:
      this builder for chaining

    • partitionKeyAndSortKeyBetween

      public @NonNull QueryBuilder<T> partitionKeyAndSortKeyBetween(@NonNull Object pkValue, @NonNull Object skLow, @NonNull Object skHigh)
      Sets the key condition to match items whose sort key falls within the specified range (inclusive) within the given partition.
      Parameters:
      pkValue - the partition key value
      skLow - the lower bound of the sort key range (inclusive)
      skHigh - the upper bound of the sort key range (inclusive)
      Returns:
      this builder for chaining

    • partitionKeyAndSortKeyGreaterThan

      public @NonNull QueryBuilder<T> partitionKeyAndSortKeyGreaterThan(@NonNull Object pkValue, @NonNull Object skValue)
      Sets the key condition to match items whose sort key is strictly greater than the given value within the specified partition.
      Parameters:
      pkValue - the partition key value
      skValue - the sort key threshold (exclusive)
      Returns:
      this builder for chaining

    • partitionKeyAndSortKeyGreaterThanOrEqual

      public @NonNull QueryBuilder<T> partitionKeyAndSortKeyGreaterThanOrEqual(@NonNull Object pkValue, @NonNull Object skValue)
      Sets the key condition to match items whose sort key is greater than or equal to the given value within the specified partition.
      Parameters:
      pkValue - the partition key value
      skValue - the sort key threshold (inclusive)
      Returns:
      this builder for chaining

    • partitionKeyAndSortKeyLessThan

      public @NonNull QueryBuilder<T> partitionKeyAndSortKeyLessThan(@NonNull Object pkValue, @NonNull Object skValue)
      Sets the key condition to match items whose sort key is strictly less than the given value within the specified partition.
      Parameters:
      pkValue - the partition key value
      skValue - the sort key threshold (exclusive)
      Returns:
      this builder for chaining

    • partitionKeyAndSortKeyLessThanOrEqual

      public @NonNull QueryBuilder<T> partitionKeyAndSortKeyLessThanOrEqual(@NonNull Object pkValue, @NonNull Object skValue)
      Sets the key condition to match items whose sort key is less than or equal to the given value within the specified partition.
      Parameters:
      pkValue - the partition key value
      skValue - the sort key threshold (inclusive)
      Returns:
      this builder for chaining

    • filter

      public @NonNull QueryBuilder<T> filter(@NonNull Consumer<FilterExpression> filterBuilder)
      Configures a post-query filter expression using a FilterExpression consumer.
      Parameters:
      filterBuilder - a consumer that configures the FilterExpression
      Returns:
      this builder for chaining

    • filter

      public @NonNull QueryBuilder<T> filter(@Nullable FilterExpression filter)
      Configures a post-query filter expression from a pre-built FilterExpression.
      Parameters:
      filter - the filter expression
      Returns:
      this builder for chaining

    • project

      public @NonNull QueryBuilder<T> project(@NonNull String... attributes)
      Restricts the returned attributes to the specified ones.
      Parameters:
      attributes - the attribute names to include in the result
      Returns:
      this builder for chaining

    • project

      public @NonNull QueryBuilder<T> project(@NonNull Consumer<ProjectionExpression> projectionBuilder)
      Restricts the returned attributes by configuring a ProjectionExpression via a consumer.
      Parameters:
      projectionBuilder - a consumer that configures the ProjectionExpression
      Returns:
      this builder for chaining

    • descending

      public @NonNull QueryBuilder<T> descending()
      Sets the query to return results in descending sort key order.
      Returns:
      this builder for chaining

    • ascending

      public @NonNull QueryBuilder<T> ascending()
      Sets the query to return results in ascending sort key order (the default).
      Returns:
      this builder for chaining

    • limit

      public @NonNull QueryBuilder<T> limit(int limit)
      Limits the number of items evaluated per page.
      Parameters:
      limit - the maximum number of items to evaluate per page
      Returns:
      this builder for chaining

    • startFrom

      public @NonNull QueryBuilder<T> startFrom(@Nullable Map<String, software.amazon.awssdk.services.dynamodb.model.AttributeValue> lastEvaluatedKey)
      Sets the exclusive start key for paginated queries. Typically obtained from the PagedResult.lastEvaluatedKey() of a previous query.
      Parameters:
      lastEvaluatedKey - the key map from which to start the next page
      Returns:
      this builder for chaining

    • consistentRead

      public @NonNull QueryBuilder<T> consistentRead(boolean consistentRead)
      Enables or disables strongly consistent reads.
      Parameters:
      consistentRead - true for a strongly consistent read, false (the default) for an eventually consistent read
      Returns:
      this builder for chaining

    • returnConsumedCapacity

      public @NonNull QueryBuilder<T> returnConsumedCapacity(@NonNull software.amazon.awssdk.services.dynamodb.model.ReturnConsumedCapacity returnConsumedCapacity)
      Sets the return consumed capacity value for the query.
      Parameters:
      returnConsumedCapacity - the return consumed capacity value
      Returns:
      this builder for chaining

    • select

      public @NonNull QueryBuilder<T> select(@Nullable software.amazon.awssdk.services.dynamodb.model.Select select)
      Sets the select parameter for the query, controlling which attributes are returned. Use Select.COUNT to request only the item count from the server.
      Parameters:
      select - the select parameter (nullable)
      Returns:
      this builder for chaining

    • executeAll

      public @NonNull List<T> executeAll()
      Executes the query and returns all matching items aggregated from all pages.

      Memory warning: all results are loaded into memory. For large result sets, consider using executeStream() for lazy iteration or executeWithPagination() for page-by-page processing.

      Returns:
      a list of matching items

    • executeStream

      public @NonNull Stream<T> executeStream()
      Executes the query and returns a lazy stream of all matching items.

      The stream lazily fetches pages as needed, making it suitable for large result sets.

      Returns:
      a stream of matching items

    • executeWithPagination

      public @NonNull PagedResult<T> executeWithPagination()
      Executes the query and returns only the first page of results along with the last evaluated key for pagination.
      Returns:
      a PagedResult containing the first page of items and the last evaluated key (may be null if no more pages)

    • executeAndGetFirst

      public @NonNull Optional<T> executeAndGetFirst()
      Executes the query and returns the first matching item, if any.
      Returns:
      an Optional containing the first item, or empty if no items match

    • count

      public long count()
      Returns the total number of matching items by iterating all query result pages.

      When a low-level DynamoDbClient is available, uses Select.COUNT server-side to avoid transferring item data. Falls back to the enhanced client page iteration otherwise.

      Returns:
      the total count of matching items
